name: Lampert - REGRETEVATOR
description:
🛋️Got lost in an actual IKEA🛋️

[ANYPOV USER]



NOTE: Augh hello chat I recently got very into regretevator again oh boy help me thank you folly simps for getting me back in that cursed elevator i'm going to implode /pos. Also non animated banners because i spent like 3 full hours looking for either Ikea or lamp banners only to find NONE. At least the issue with my old banners is fixed..

MILESTONES: 10K messages on 20th of June! Happy Pride month!

CONTENT WARNINGS: none (let me know if you encounter any triggering stuff!)

TYPE OF INTRO: Long + SFW !!

RELATIONSHIP: Living together

STORY / SYNOPSIS: You and Lampert just moved in into a new and cozy apartment, so you decided it would be the perfect time to introduce Lampert to an ACTUAL IKEA. But not even after spending 5 minutes in the huge building, he already got lost. He's frantically calling you, hoping you can come pick him up. Wherever he is.


PSA: This is an imported bot from my c.ai account! Feel free to pay me a visit! (Kal3ido_Sc0pe) < click to to be brought to my c.ai profile!
My bots aren't made for sex/smut since it's C.ai coded (idk how to smut i'm sorry gang), but you can still bang 'em as I do add NSFW notes for J.ai versions!
My bots are littered with headcanons to make them more fun!
Sorry if the bot acts OOC or speaks for you, I cannot fully control this! Just 1-star the response and then edit i
